history.what_worked: Reading scripts/audit_skills.py first to extract the kebab-case regex, then mirroring it in scaffold.sh so the scaffolder cannot produce a name the audit will reject.
history.what_didnt: No failure observed yet, but the latent risk is the audit script's rules drifting from any scaffolder/validator that reimplements them from memory.
history.rule_change: Any tool in .claude/skills/ that produces files for skills/ must validate against scripts/audit_skills.py rules — either by calling the audit script after writing, or by mirroring its regex with a comment pointing back to the source. Do not reimplement the rules from memory.
